title: Gramophone (Unofficial Vintage Sound Addon)
description: Adds custom sounds themed around the resource pack Vintage!
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e-YLU557aOU<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/e-YLU557aOU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This is a small sound oriented resource pack that is themed around [Vintage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vintage), a favorite pack of mine. It is not affiliated with the official project in any way and is merely a homage. 

It features some remastered versions of older sounds and reworks sand.

Vintage is not required, but is recommended.

[Console Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/consolesounds) is also heavily recommended!

Icon belongs to [Vintage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vintage)!
